REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF DID NOT ALLEGE AN ACTION OR CLAIM TO ENFORCE THE MECHANIC'S LIEN AND CC SECTION 8480(C) DOES NOT ALLOW DEFENDANT TO PETITION UNDER PLAINTIFF'S BREACH OF CONTRACT ACTION. JUDGE: CHARLES F. MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-16-2024 IN 206, APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES. CROSS-DEFENDANT NAYEF ALWARDAT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL IS GRANTED PER STIPULATION. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE IS VACATED AND RE-SET FOR 4/14/25 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY AND ALL PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES ARE ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE DUE TO THE GRANTING OF THIS MOTION FOR SUCH A LONG TIME PERIOD FROM THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING CROSS-DEFENDANT NAYEF M. ALWARDAT DBA NEW VISION CONSTRUCTION'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-08-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-08-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ATLANTIC SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION OF ATLANTIC SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR INTERPLEADER; DECLARATION OF ROSA MARTINEZ-GENZON AND LISA COZZI IN SUPPORT THEREOF, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ATLANTIC SPECIALTY INSURANCE CO.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR INTERPLEADER IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Atlantic Specialty Insurance Company For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Interpleader; Declaration Of Rosa Martinez-Genzon And Lisa Cozzi In Support Thereof; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ATLANTIC SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion Of Atlantic Specialty Insurance Company For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Interpleader; Declaration Of Rosa Martinez-Genzon And Lisa Cozzi In Support Thereof.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Atlantic Specialty Insurance Co.'s unopposed motion for leave to file cross-complaint for interpleader is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Continued To Apr-14-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Text Ruling

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Oct-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT'NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff did not allege an action or claim to enforce the mechanic's lien and CC Section 8480(c) does not allow Defendant to petition under Plaintiff's breach of contract action.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-03-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
